detailed_camera_plan: Following 秦嬴 as he walks through the door, camera movement slows as heat haze effect is introduced.
action_description: 秦嬴走出房门，感受到灼热空气

character_poses.秦嬴: Stepping forward, squinting as if hit by glare.

setting_details: 秦氏庄园走廊，明亮刺眼的光线。
ending_composition_description: 秦嬴 standing in doorway, hand shielding brow.
